notes: Country-level VIZA RAG seed for thailand. This file is the source of truth for this country's visitor/tourism visa knowledge and is designed to evolve alongside the country-specific form-filling workflow.

chunks.title: 中国护照泰国短期旅游签证建议
chunks.content: 中国护照持有人赴泰国短期旅游时，VIZA AI 应优先核查泰国外交部/使领馆当前 visa exemption、visa on arrival 或 tourist visa 规则。泰国规则近年调整频繁，回答时要说明需以出发前泰国官方页面为准，并确认停留天数、入境次数、是否有返程/续程票和是否需要长期停留。

chunks.title: Thailand visa exemption overview
chunks.content: Royal Thai Embassy guidance for the visa exemption scheme states that ordinary passport holders of eligible countries/territories can enter for tourism without a visa for a period not exceeding 60 days, subject to current official lists and entry checks. Travellers may be asked for proof of adequate funds, confirmed onward travel, accommodation, and passport validity. If the user's nationality is not eligible, recommend Thai e-Visa or a tourist visa route.

chunks.title: When Thailand tourist visa may be needed
chunks.content: If a traveller wants to stay beyond the visa-exempt period, enter repeatedly, work remotely under a specific long-stay route, or is not eligible for exemption, VIZA AI should not assume visa-free entry. Route them to the official Thai e-Visa / Royal Thai Embassy guidance for tourist visa or other visa categories.

documents.title: Thailand TDAC Arrival Card Form Requirements

chunks.title: Thailand application channel and form scope
chunks.content: Use the standalone TH_TDAC_ARRIVAL_CARD package for Thailand Digital Arrival Card preparation. Official source URLs reviewed for this seed: https://tdac.immigration.go.th/manual/en/index.html ; https://tdac.immigration.go.th/manual/en/faq.html. TDAC is not a Thai tourist visa or Thai e-Visa and must stay separate from visa-exemption or e-Visa workflows. Route work, study, residence, immigration, journalism or other regulated purposes to a separate country workflow.

chunks.title: Thailand fields to collect before filling the form
chunks.content: Thailand TDAC intake should collect personal details, passport details, nationality, occupation, contact details, travel purpose, arrival/departure dates, mode of travel, flight/vehicle/vessel details, country or region boarded, port of arrival, accommodation/address in Thailand, health declaration details, and official declaration acknowledgements. Do not silently reuse Thai e-Visa fields for TDAC.

chunks.title: Thailand supporting documents and review checklist
chunks.content: TDAC preparation evidence should focus on passport details, travel itinerary, arrival/departure dates, transport details, Thai accommodation/address, and health declaration information. Workflow guardrails: VIZA should keep TDAC separate from Thai tourist visa and e-Visa workflows and avoid promising entry because immigration checks still apply.

chunks.title: Standard passport identity-field answer rules
chunks.content: Standard-answer identity fields must be answered from the applicant's passport biodata page, MRZ, official identity document, or the official dropdown options. This applies to passport number, name, date of birth, sex, nationality, issuing country, issue date, expiry date, issuing authority, place of issue, and passport/document type. For issuing authority or place-of-issue questions, do not infer the answer from the pickup city, residence city, application country, or travel destination; copy the exact Authority / Issuing authority / Place of issue wording printed on the passport if present. For Chinese ordinary passports, newer valid passports may show National Immigration Administration, PRC / 中华人民共和国国家移民管理局; older valid passports may show MPS Exit & Entry Administration / 公安部出入境管理局. If the passport prints a different authority, use the passport text. For passport type, select Ordinary / Regular / Normal only for ordinary personal passports; select Diplomatic, Official, Service, Special, Travel document, Refugee, or Other only when the document explicitly indicates that type. Official sources reviewed for this standard field rule include China National Immigration Administration certificate-issuing-authority notices and the Passport Law of the People's Republic of China; the passport biodata page remains the final source for the applicant's individual answer.

chunks.title: Official-source field answer norms
chunks.content:
Official-source field answer norms for thailand.
Use these norms only as filling guidance; if a live official form, passport, or uploaded document shows a more specific value, that document controls the answer.

Crawled source URLs: https://tdac.immigration.go.th/manual/en/index.html ; https://tdac.immigration.go.th/manual/en/faq.html

Passport and identity fields:
- yo​ur personal information, including passport details.
- you boarded, your nationality, or your flight is listed by the Ministry of
- the personal information of Traveler 1, including passport details.

Issue, expiry, and validity fields:
- No, This Thailand Digital Arrival Card is only valid for one time use for travel on the expected date of arrival indicated.

Travel plan and port fields:
- The Thailand Digital Arrival Card (TDAC) is an online form designed to replace the traditional paper-based arrival card and facilitate the entry process for travelers to Thailand, regardless of their mode of transportation via land, air, or sea.
- All non-Thai nationals entering the Kingdom of Thailand are required to complete the Thailand Digital Arrival Card online prior to entry.
- Foreigners are required to submit their arrival card information 3 days in advance of their arrival date in Thailand.

Accommodation, host, and address fields:
- your trip information and accommodation information details, then click " Continue ".
- your email address to receive the Thailand Digital Arrival Card.
- the email address provided for the duration of your stay in Thailand.

Funds, insurance, photo, and supporting-document fields:
- MRZ or upload an MRZ image to retrieve data automatically.
- also scan the MRZ or upload an MRZ image to retrieve data automatically.
- For Kiosk submissions, foreigners can take a photo of the QR Code from the Digital Arrival Card.

Answering rule: for closed-list fields, prefer the exact official option label/value. For document-backed fields, copy the passport, official identity document, application account, itinerary, invitation, accommodation, insurance, funds, or uploaded support document rather than guessing from a city, country, or prior answer.
